product_overview: Rim-eBay (Eddeyar) is a Mauritania-focused marketplace for real estate and general classifieds that enables anonymous browsing, secure user accounts with phone/email OTP verification, and full listing creation and management including images and localized search.
core_goals: Enable fast discovery of listings with advanced filters and optional AI-powered queries.
Provide secure, locally compatible user authentication and phone OTP verification.
Allow users to create, edit, and manage listings (including images) through a clear multi-step workflow.
Support localized search and mapping (wilayas/moughataas) for accurate geolocation of listings.
Offer simple personal features: favorites, contact management, and session management (login/logout).

features.name: Browse & Search Listings
features.description: Discover public listings with hierarchical location filters, category filters, price range and optional AI-powered queries; navigate to details and paginate results.
user_flows: Navigate to /ar -> View listing cards on the home page -> Filter by category, type, wilaya (region), moughataa (district) -> Filter by price range -> Search by keyword or AI-powered query -> Paginate through results -> Navigate to listing detail page (/ar/p/annonces/details/[id])
Navigate to /ar -> Search by keyword or AI-powered query -> See no results due to AI search failure -> Broaden filters to basic criteria -> Paginate through results

features.name: Listing Details
features.description: View full public details for a listing including images, map location, price, description and seller contact; optionally favorite the listing when authenticated.
user_flows: Navigate to /ar/p/annonces/details/[id] -> View listing images in carousel -> Read listing description, price, location -> View map location -> View seller contact information -> Toggle favorite if logged in
Navigate to /ar/p/annonces/details/[id] -> View listing images in carousel -> Attempt to view seller contact information -> See limited or missing contact details due to verification or network error

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate with email/password or phone OTP; successful login stores a JWT in an httpOnly cookie and redirects to the home page.
user_flows: Navigate to /ar/p/users/connexion -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Submit login form -> Redirect to /ar on success
Navigate to /ar/p/users/connexion -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Submit login form -> See error message on invalid credentials

Navigate to /ar/p/users/connexion -> Switch to phone login tab -> Enter phone number and receive OTP -> Navigate to /ar/p/verification/otp -> Enter 4-digit OTP code -> Submit OTP -> Redirect to /ar on success
Navigate to /ar/p/users/connexion -> Switch to phone login tab -> Enter phone number -> Do not receive OTP -> See error or timeout and use resend flow

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Create a new account using email or phone; phone registrations require OTP verification before full account activation.
user_flows: Navigate to /ar/p/users/register -> Choose registration method (email) -> Fill name, email, password fields -> Submit form -> Redirect to /ar on success
Navigate to /ar/p/users/register -> Choose registration method (phone) -> Fill name and phone number -> Submit form -> Redirect to /ar/p/verification/otp for OTP verification
Navigate to /ar/p/users/register -> Choose registration method (email or phone) -> Submit form with invalid fields -> See validation errors

features.name: OTP Verification
features.description: Verify phone numbers by entering a received 4-digit SMS OTP; support code resend and auto-login on success.
user_flows: Navigate to /ar/p/verification/otp -> Enter 4-digit OTP code -> Submit OTP -> Auto-login on successful verification -> Redirect to /ar
Navigate to /ar/p/verification/otp -> Enter incorrect or expired OTP -> See error on wrong code or expiry -> Request OTP resend -> Receive new OTP and retry

features.name: Password Reset
features.description: Recover account access by sending a reset OTP to the registered phone number and setting a new password after OTP validation.
user_flows: Navigate to /ar/p/users/forgot-password -> Enter phone number -> Receive OTP via SMS -> Navigate to /ar/p/users/reset-password -> Enter OTP code -> Enter new password and confirm -> Submit reset form -> Redirect to /ar/p/users/connexion
Navigate to /ar/p/users/forgot-password -> Enter phone number -> Receive OTP via SMS -> Navigate to /ar/p/users/reset-password -> Enter wrong or expired OTP -> See error on invalid code
Navigate to /ar/p/users/forgot-password -> Enter phone number -> Attempt to submit reset and receive 501 Not Implemented response -> See error indicating password reset is unavailable

features.name: Create Listing (3-step wizard)
features.description: Publish a new annonce via a guided 3-step flow (details, location, images) with validation per step and image upload support.
user_flows: Navigate to /ar/my/add -> Step 1 select category, type, fill title and description, set price -> Step 2 choose wilaya and moughataa location -> Step 3 upload up to 8 images -> Submit listing -> Redirect to /ar/my/list on success
Navigate to /ar/my/add -> Step 1 leave required fields blank -> Attempt to proceed -> See validation errors preventing step advancement
Navigate to /ar/my/add -> Step 2 choose wilaya -> Observe moughataas empty due to API data issue -> Set approximate location via map or broaden selection -> Continue to Step 3 and submit

features.name: Manage My Listings
features.description: View and manage user's own listings with status indicators; edit, soft-delete and inspect listing details from the user's dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /ar/my/list -> View all own listings with status (active, pending, deleted) -> Click to edit a listing -> Navigate to /ar/my/details/[id] -> Save changes -> Return to /ar/my/list and see updated listing
Navigate to /ar/my/list -> Choose to delete a listing -> Confirm delete -> See listing marked as deleted (soft delete) in the list
Navigate to /ar/my/list -> Attempt to delete a listing -> See error due to API failure and listing remains unchanged

features.name: Edit Listing
features.description: Update an existing listing's metadata and location with server-side persistence and validation.
user_flows: Navigate to /ar/my/details/[id] -> Edit title, description, price fields -> Change category or type -> Update location -> Save changes -> See updated listing details
Navigate to /ar/my/details/[id] -> Edit fields with invalid values -> Save changes -> See validation errors and persist prevented

features.name: Manage Listing Images
features.description: Add, remove and set a main cover image for a listing with file type/size validation and image list management.
user_flows: Navigate to /ar/my/details/[id]/images -> View existing images -> Upload new images (JPEG, PNG, WebP, max 10MB each) -> Set main cover image -> See uploaded images listed
Navigate to /ar/my/details/[id]/images -> Attempt to upload an image larger than 10MB -> See validation error and upload rejected
Navigate to /ar/my/details/[id]/images -> Delete an image -> See image removed from listing UI and image record removed from DB (note: physical blob deletion may remain in storage)

features.name: Favorites
features.description: Save listings for later and view or remove favorites from a personal list.
user_flows: Navigate to /ar/my/favorite -> View all favorited listings -> Click to view listing detail (/ar/p/annonces/details/[id]) -> Remove a listing from favorites -> See listing removed from favorites list
Navigate to /ar/my/favorite -> Attempt to remove a favorite -> See error on network failure and favorite remains

features.name: Logout
features.description: Terminate the current user session and clear authentication cookies, returning the user to the public home page.
user_flows: Navigate to any authenticated page (for example /ar/my/list) -> Initiate logout -> POST to /api/p/users/logout executed -> Redirect to /ar and see anonymous state
Navigate to any authenticated page -> Initiate logout -> Network or server error occurs -> See error and remain authenticated

tech_stack.ui_library: Tailwind CSS 3.4.1, Headless UI, Heroicons, Lucide React, FontAwesome, Swiper, React Leaflet

tech_stack.other: MongoDB, JWT, next-international (i18n), Vercel Blob, Chinguisoft SMS, Resend, Playwright

routes.description: Home page with listing search and browse
User registration with email or phone

features.name: Browse & Search Listings
features.description: Home page with filter-based search for real estate and general marketplace listings
user_interactions: View listing cards on the home page
Filter by category, type, wilaya (region), moughataa (district)
Search by keyword or AI-powered query

features.name: Listing Details
features.description: Public page showing full details of a listing including images, location, price and contact info

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with email and password or phone OTP, JWT stored in httpOnly cookie
user_interactions: See error message on invalid credentials
Redirect to home page on success
Enter phone number and receive OTP

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Register a new account with email or phone
user_interactions: Fill name, email, password fields for email flow
Fill name and phone number for phone flow
Redirect to OTP verification page for phone flow

features.name: OTP Verification
features.description: Verify phone number via SMS OTP code sent by Chinguisoft
user_interactions: Request OTP resend if not received
See error on wrong code or expiry

features.name: Password Reset
features.description: Recover account access via phone OTP

features.name: Create Listing (3-step wizard)
features.description: Multi-step form to publish a new annonce with details, location, and images
user_interactions: Step 1 select category, type, fill title and description, set price
Step 2 choose wilaya and moughataa location
Redirect to listing management after success

features.name: Manage My Listings
features.description: Dashboard to view, edit, and delete user's own listings
user_interactions: View all own listings with status (active, pending, deleted)

features.name: Edit Listing
features.description: Update an existing listing's details

features.name: Manage Listing Images
features.description: Add or remove images for a specific listing
user_interactions: Upload new images (JPEG, PNG, WebP, max 10MB each)

features.name: Favorites
features.description: Save and view favorite listings

features.name: Logout
features.description: Sign out the current user and clear session
user_interactions: Redirect to home page after logout

known_limitations.issue: Password reset endpoint returns 501 Not Implemented
known_limitations.impact: Users cannot complete the password reset flow

known_limitations.issue: OTP code hardcoded as "1234" in some development paths
known_limitations.impact: Security risk if left in production

known_limitations.issue: Image physical deletion from Vercel Blob not implemented
known_limitations.impact: Deleted images still exist in cloud storage, only DB record removed

known_limitations.issue: AI-powered search returns empty results on API failure with no fallback
known_limitations.impact: AI search failures show no listings instead of falling back to standard search

known_limitations.issue: Moughataas and GPS location endpoints return empty data
known_limitations.impact: Location picker may not show district options
